description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark brown wood grain finish. The front features two tall glass-paneled doors, each with a vertical metallic handle, revealing multiple evenly spaced interior shelves. The sides and back are solid wood, with the back panel being completely flat and unadorned. The top of the cabinet is flat and slightly protrudes, providing a subtle decorative ledge. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for storing books, display items, or other belongings in an urban environment. The glass panels allow for visibility of the contents while keeping them protected from dust.
description: A large, dark wood cabinet with glass-paneled double doors and multiple interior shelves, featuring metallic handles and a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two glass-paneled doors with metallic handles and visible interior shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood panel.
